{{Infobox character
| name = Fury
| parents = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Malice]]}}
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Mercy]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[Akura Pride|Pride]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[shadow madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, Wolf Division techniques}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Herald]], [[Monarch]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Sage]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Monarch's family, [[Akura prime team|Akura team]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Akura clan|Akura family]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sky's Edge]], [[fortress]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

''See also: [[Fury Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Fury is a powerful figure characterized by his large physical frame, crimson eyes, and wild, shadowy hair that moves as if underwater. A member of a prominent family, he is the son of [[Malice]]—born before she attained the rank of [[Monarch]]—and the father of [[Sage]] [[Charity]]. He holds the distinction of being [[Malice]]'s preferred child and the only one of her direct lineage to reach the rank of [[Herald]]. Throughout his [[life]], he has progressed through significant stages of power, eventually breaking through as an [[Icon]] and advancing toward the rank of [[Monarch]]. In combat, Fury is a formidable warrior who utilizes wind [[aura]] and [[soulfire]] to fly and move with ease. He wears seamless white [[Abidan]] armor and utilizes the techniques of the [[Wolf Division]] to reinforce himself. Though he possesses immense experience, often compared to that of a [[Monarch]], his personality is marked by a bright, conversational, and sometimes lighthearted demeanor. He possesses a deep-seated love for battle and often expresses boredom or disappointment when there are no enemies to fight. Despite his capacity for intense combat and a reputation that some cultures view as monstrous, he can also be insightful, showing interest in those with potential and offering guidance to younger family members.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A [[Herald]] who utilizes [[shadow madra]], Fury is a member of the [[Monarch]]'s family and an ancestor of [[Akura Grace]]. During the conflict, Fury caught a massive chunk of stone and was associated with a ship and rainbow light. As a member of the [[Akura]] team, Fury is also identified as both the uncle and older brother of [[Mercy]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] uses [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] is a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] is an ancestor of [[Akura Grace]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] is a member of the [[Monarch]]'s family.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] caught a massive chunk of stone.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] is associated with a ship and rainbow light.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] is a member of the [[Akura]] team.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Fury]] is [[Mercy]]'s uncle and older brother.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Herald]] of the [[Akura]] family and the son of [[Mercy]], Fury traveled via cloudship with the intention of slowing down the [[Abyssal Palace]]. While stationed at a fortress to prevent attacks, he became pinned in [[Sky's Edge]] by [[Dreadgod cults]] and gold [[dragons]] while facing threats from enemy [[Heralds]]. During this conflict, he was tasked with watching over [[Lindon]]'s team to ensure no [[Herald]] interference occurred. Fury eventually began to ascend to [[Monarch]], utilizing the authority of a [[Sage]] alongside a second source of power. Following his ascension, he received word regarding [[Yerin]]'s transition into a half-[[Herald]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is the son of [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is a member of the [[Akura]] family who delayed their departure to watch the fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] mentions [[Uncle Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] possesses a cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is scheduled to arrive at the [[Wandering Titan]]'s location in two days.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is a [[Herald]] in the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is someone the [[Seishen King]] might avoid punishment from.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] would execute [[Daji]] for his actions.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]]'s objective was to slow [[Abyssal Palace]] down.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] pays in points for destroyed towers and stolen masks.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] has a nephew.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is on the cloudship and suddenly stands up.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is located in the fortress and prevents attacks.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is pinned in [[Sky's Edge]] by gold [[dragons]] and [[Dreadgod cults]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is being threatened by enemy [[Heralds]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is someone [[Malice]] would sacrifice for her family.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is tasked with watching over [[Lindon]]'s team to prevent [[Herald]] interference.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Uncle Fury]] told [[Mercy]] and others about a way out.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Malice]] intends to save [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is a character whose eyes [[Yerin]] found similar to her own.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] wanted to be close to [[Fury]] to get a battle report.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] began to laugh overhead.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] is ascending to [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] used the authority of a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] instructs [[Dross]] to tell [[Fury]] something.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] possesses two different sources of authority.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] received a report about [[Yerin]] becoming a half-[[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fury]] has crimson eyes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fury]] is gone.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fury]] is a person who was unable to breathe due to a simple script.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] gave up [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The cults in [[Sacred Valley]] bear marks from a fight with [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Fury]] is the son of [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fury]]'s ascension allows bringing people along.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|As the half-brother of [[Pride]], Fury possesses striking features, including eyes that bear a strong resemblance to those of [[Yerin]]. This entity is capable of performing subtle gestures, such as nodding to a glass marble, and has previously torn open a rift. When Fury's hair drifts upward into a point, his eyes glow red, and he is often seen wearing white gauntlets. Additionally, Fury played a role in [[Lindon]]'s journey by recommending [[Wavedancer]] to him.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fury]] recommended [[Wavedancer]] to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s eyes are much like [[Fury]]'s.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fury]] has torn open a rift.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fury]] is capable of nodding to a glass marble.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fury]] wears white gauntlets.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fury]]'s eyes glow red when his hair drifts up to a point.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fury]] is [[Pride]]'s half-brother.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Akura Fury]] is an ascended individual and the half-brother of [[Akura Pride]]. As [[Mercy]]'s uncle, he possesses more experience than almost anyone in [[Cradle]] except for certain [[Monarchs]]. He wears [[Abidan]] armor and utilizes [[Wolf Division]] techniques, often appearing as a streak of white while flying. During combat, he uses a white gauntlet to deliver downward punches and gathers [[madra]] with the intent of punching through the planet. His shadowy hair drifts in unseen currents, and he is capable of using his [[Presence]] to transmit his voice directly into [[Mercy]]'s mind.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] is [[Mercy]]'s uncle.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]]'s armor blurs into a streak of white when he flies.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] has ascended.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] uses a white gauntlet to launch downward punches.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] wears [[Abidan]] armor and can use [[Wolf Division]] techniques.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] is [[Akura Fury]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] is a strong individual who has more experience than anyone in [[Cradle]] short of some [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] has shadowy hair that drifts in unseen currents.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] is gathering [[madra]] to punch through the planet.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]]'s [[Presence]] can transmit his voice to [[Mercy]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] is [[Mercy]]'s uncle.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Fury]] is [[Akura Pride]]'s half-brother.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Stay safe, tell Uncle Fury I’ll see him soon, and I’ll join you as soon as I can, okay?”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“My mother did give us a way out,” Mercy said hurriedly. “Uncle Fury told us.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Glad to see you again too, Uncle Fury!”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
